items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-80 eastbound between 3 miles east of Exit 178: PA 220 NORTH - LOCK HAVEN and 3.7 miles east of Exit 178: PA 220 NORTH - LOCK HAVEN. There is a lane restriction.
